name: Revlon, Inc.
description: Revlon, Inc. is a prominent American multinational company specializing in the manufacturing and marketing of cosmetics, skincare, fragrance, and personal care products. Founded in 1932 and headquartered in New York City, the company offers a diverse portfolio of beauty brands, including its namesake Revlon line and Elizabeth Arden. Revlon is widely recognized for its innovative beauty products, ranging from color cosmetics like lipstick and nail enamel to hair color and professional salon tools, maintaining a significant global presence in the beauty and personal care industry.
